- F-BIPOR-02: migration 20260425_image_channel_pricing_trigger（PL/pgSQL validate_image_channel_pricing + BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE OF costPrice,modelId trigger，仅校验 IMAGE modality，ERRCODE='check_violation'）；dev DB 已 apply 并集成测试 4 条全过
- F-BIPOR-01: scripts/pricing/fix-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts（6 条 OR_IMAGE_PRICES 硬编码 + tokenPriceMatches ±1e-6 容差幂等）+ 11 单测（覆盖 6 entry / dry-run vs apply / 幂等 / DB drift / tolerance）
- F-BIPOR-03: src/lib/api/__tests__/or-token-pricing-reverse-calc.test.ts 10 单测（4 channel 反算 / FILTERED 只算 input / ERROR cost=0 / token-zero fallback / sell/cost 1.19-1.21）+ scripts/pricing/verify-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts smoke（公式校验，1e-6 容差）

生产 apply 须由用户/Codex ssh 执行：
  npx tsx scripts/pricing/fix-or-image-channels-2026-04-25.ts          # dry-run 复核 6 条 diff

  幂等重跑应输出 6 行 [no change]

注意：trigger migration 需 prisma migrate deploy 应用；apply 后老 IMAGE channel 若任何修改路径写 cost=0 都会被 check_violation 拦截，旧 admin 客户端（若有）需要更新。
